# Jon's ALS Protocol

> Jon Edy has been living with ALS for over 6 years and is still walking. He shares his exact supplement protocol, daily routine, and the mindset framework that keeps him going — so other ALS patients and caregivers don't have to piece it together alone.

## About This Site
- Jon Edy is an ALS patient, not a doctor. This site shares his personal experience.
- The site includes free blog content and a paid protocol guide ($39 one-time).
- All supplement information is shared for educational purposes. Nothing on this site is medical advice.

## Key Pages

### Homepage
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/
- Jon's personal story, protocol overview, and mindset philosophy

### About Jon
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/about.html
- Jon's ALS diagnosis story, how he built his protocol, his 5 rules for living with ALS

### The Protocol
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/protocol.html
- Full supplement protocol details, pricing ($39 one-time or $9.99/month subscription), FAQ

### Blog
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/
- Free articles about supplements, mindset, daily routine, and caregiver guides

## Blog Posts

### How I Think About ALS: The Mental Approach That Keeps Me Walking
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/mindset-als.html
- Jon's 5 rules for living with ALS, the moment he decided "this disease will not kill me"

### L-Serine for ALS: What the Research Says and Why I Take It
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/l-serine-for-als.html
- Phase 1 clinical trial showing ~85% slower functional decline, FDA GRAS status, how Jon takes 30g/day

### HMB for Muscle Preservation: A Bodybuilding Supplement for ALS?
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/hmb-muscle-preservation.html
- Beta-Hydroxy Beta-Methylbutyrate for reducing muscle breakdown in ALS

### Creatine for ALS: Can a Gym Supplement Help?
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/creatine-for-als.html
- Creatine monohydrate research for ALS, mixed clinical results but sound mechanism

### My Daily Routine with ALS
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/daily-routine.html
- Jon's complete daily schedule: supplement timing, exercise, meals, evening wind-down

### What to Ask Your Neurologist About Supplements
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/what-to-ask-your-neurologist.html
- Practical questions for ALS patients bringing supplements to their doctor

### For Caregivers: How to Use This Protocol for Someone You Love
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/caregiver-guide.html
- Guide for caregivers managing supplement protocols for ALS patients

### Vitamin D3 for ALS
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/vitamin-d3-als.html
- Foundation supplement, 5000 IU daily, deficiency linked to faster ALS progression

### Omega-3 Fish Oil for ALS
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/omega-3-fish-oil-als.html
- High-dose EPA+DHA for neuroinflammation, 3-4g daily

### CoQ10 for ALS
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/coq10-als.html
- Mitochondrial support, ubiquinol 200-400mg daily, Phase II trial data

### NAC and Glutathione for ALS
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/glutathione-als.html
- Antioxidant strategy, NAC 600mg twice daily, SOD1 connection

### How I Built This Protocol
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/blog/how-i-research.html
- Research methodology, PubMed-based evaluation, 5-point supplement framework

### My Complete Supplement Stack
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/supplements.html
- Free public reference table of all ~20 supplements with categories and general doses

### My ALS Journey Timeline
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/timeline.html
- Visual timeline of Jon's 6+ year ALS journey from diagnosis to present

### Contact
- URL: https://jons-als-protocol.vercel.app/contact.html
- How to reach Jon Edy directly

## Topics Covered
- ALS supplements (L-Serine, HMB, Creatine, Vitamin D3, and ~17 more)
- ALS patient mindset and mental health
- ALS caregiver support
- Supplement-doctor communication
- Daily routines for ALS patients
- Muscle preservation in neurodegenerative disease

## Author
- Name: Jon Edy
- Role: ALS Patient & Protocol Author
- Diagnosed: Over 6 years ago
- Status: Still walking
- Location: Colorado (Rocky Mountain ALS community)
